title: Clean Uninstall
description: Uninstall selected software with approval gates, user-data preservation by default, leftover review, verification, and reportable evidence.
starter_prompt: Uninstall the requested application cleanly. Preserve user data unless I explicitly ask otherwise.

arguments.command: $ErrorActionPreference='Continue'; $name='${app_name}'; Write-Output '== Installed apps: registry uninstall keys =='; Get-ItemProperty HKLM:\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Uninstall\*,HKLM:\Software\WOW6432Node\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Uninstall\*,HKCU:\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Uninstall\* -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.DisplayName -like "*$name*" } | Select-Object DisplayName,DisplayVersion,Publisher,InstallLocation,UninstallString,QuietUninstallString,PSChildName | Format-List; Write-Output '== Matching packages =='; Get-Package -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.Name -like "*$name*" } | Select-Object Name,Version,ProviderName,Source | Format-Table -AutoSize; Write-Output '== Matching services =='; Get-Service | Where-Object { $_.Name -like "*$name*" -or $_.DisplayName -like "*$name*" } | Select-Object Name,DisplayName,Status,StartType | Format-Table -AutoSize; Write-Output '== Matching scheduled tasks =='; Get-ScheduledTask | Where-Object { $_.TaskName -like "*$name*" -or $_.TaskPath -like "*$name*" } | Select-Object TaskPath,TaskName,State | Format-Table -AutoSize

phases.prompt: Collect read-only installed app entries, package ownership, install path, services, tasks, and uninstall strings.
Analyze collected installed app evidence, package manager ownership, install path, services, tasks, uninstall strings, and likely user data locations.
phases.completion: App identity and ownership are known.

phases.prompt: Choose uninstall route: SAK package manager if owned by package, native uninstaller otherwise. Do not remove user data.
Ask human or apply access-mode policy before uninstall. Offer restore point when needed.
Run selected uninstall method and capture result.
Review leftovers after uninstall. Propose cleanup, but do not delete user data without approval.
phases.completion: Leftovers and cleanup options are listed.

phases.prompt: Verify removal and create a technician-readable uninstall report with app identity, evidence, actions/tools used, uninstall result, verification status, leftovers/artifacts, cleanup status, user-data preservation, residual risk, and follow-up.
phases.completion: User gets uninstall result and follow-up.

phases.prompt: Preserve uninstall logs, leftover evidence, and report artifacts; remove only temporary scratch files created by this workflow.

acceptance_criteria: Restore-point prompt occurs before risky uninstall.
User data is preserved unless explicitly approved.
Leftovers are reported separately from removed items.
